message:
feat(abi): reclassify libc symbols from GlibcCallThrough to native implementations

Migrate multiple libc symbols from host glibc delegation to native Rust
(Implemented) and raw Linux syscall (RawSyscall) implementations in the
support matrix. This tracks the actual implementation status of symbols
like alphasort, bindtextdomain, daemon, execl/execle/execlp/execvpe,
getgrouplist, gethostbyaddr(_r), getpass, getproto/getserv variants,
gettext/ngettext, hasmntopt, if_indextoname/if_nametoindex, initgroups,
and login_tty.

Updates semantics descriptions to reflect raw syscall details and
strict/hardened mode behavior for each reclassified symbol.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
